headline: HII Hosts PAE Maritime Christopher Miller at Ingalls Shipbuilding
summary: PASCAGOULA, Miss., April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) hosted Christopher Miller, the U.S. Navy’s portfolio acquisition executive for maritime (PAE Maritime), at its Ingalls Shipbuilding division Wednesday. During the visit, Miller met with company leadership and received updates on current ship programs, facility investments and Ingalls’ expanding production capacity to support the Navy’s current and future fleet requirements. “Ingalls is fully committed to our partnership with t

headline: RTX Declines 1.7% in the Past Month: How to Play the Stock?
summary: RTX stock slips 1.7% in a month as supply-chain woes and trade risks loom despite contract wins and tech advances supporting the long-term growth outlook.
